name: monopoly-banker
description: Self-hosted Monopoly money ledger and banker app

scripts.build: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace client run build
scripts.build:server: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace server run build
scripts.build:client: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace client run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace client run typecheck
